d: Teesari Begam is an emotional social drama following Pooja Dixit, a young woman deceived into marrying Babban Khan - only to discover he already has two wives. Renamed "Nagma" and trapped in a toxic household, Pooja's world unravels further when her father dies of heartbreak. With unlikely allies in her co-wives Tabassum and Shabana, she fights to reclaim her life with courage and dignity.
